title: perama humilis
intro: Perama humilis, also known as the Desert Violet or Creeping Violet, is a flowering plant native to the southwestern United States. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its roots, which contain alkaloids with anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of P. humilis include relief from fever, sore throats, and digestive issues, as well as its potential in reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, and is often used in herbal remedies to treat various ailments.
